description: astro.config.mjs configures a local Atkinson font under fonts with cssVariable --font-atkinson; BaseHead.astro injects it via <Font cssVariable="--font-atkinson" preload />. The cssVariable string and the existence of that configured font must agree across both files (a string literal, not type-checked), so renaming or removing the configured font/cssVariable silently breaks font loading site-wide and requires updating the <Font> usage here.
